title: Fresh Umbrella Villagers
description: Give villagers umbrellas! - Now with Fresh Animations!
body:
## Give villagers umbrellas! - Now with Fresh Animations!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/fresh-umbrella-villagers)




[Fresh Animations is required!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) This pack makes it so that villagers hold umbrellas when it rains! There are 24 different umbrella variants, and villagers can spawn either right handed or left handed! Now with Fresh Animations support! This pack is fully compatible with Fresh Animations!
